name: The Subject Matter Expert
effect: Gatekeep domain knowledge through selective availability. This card is considered indispensable.

clauses.name: SINGLE POINT OF FAILURE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card leaves the field: All dependent processes halt immediately.

clauses.name: TRIBAL KNOWLEDGE PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If documentation is requested: Provide a meeting instead.

clauses.name: BACKLOG OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If this card is assigned to more than two workstreams simultaneously: All workstreams are considered in progress.
